exercises.title: FIELD MATCH
exercises.brief: Check one typed field against an expected value.
promptLines: Define **propEquals<T, K extends keyof T>(obj: T, k: K, v: T[K]): boolean** returning whether `obj[k]` strictly equals `v`.
`K extends keyof T` ties `k` to a real key, and `v: T[K]` forces the compared value to match that field's type.
starterLines: function propEquals<T, K extends keyof T>(obj: T, k: K, v: T[K]): boolean {
solutionLines: function propEquals<T, K extends keyof T>(obj: T, k: K, v: T[K]): boolean {

tests.name: matching boolean
tests.code: assert(propEquals({ id: 7, on: true }, 'on', true) === true);

exercises.lore: Confirm the field reads exactly what the protocol expects.

exercises.title: FIELD FALLBACK
exercises.brief: Read a typed field, or fall back to a default of its type.
promptLines: Define **propOr<T, K extends keyof T>(obj: T, k: K, d: T[K]): T[K]** returning `obj[k]` when `k` is present, otherwise the default `d`.
Both the result and the default are typed `T[K]`, so the fallback always matches the field it replaces.
propOr({ a: 1 } as { a: number; z?: number }, 'z', 9) // 9
starterLines: function propOr<T, K extends keyof T>(obj: T, k: K, d: T[K]): T[K] {
// TODO: return obj[k] when present, else d
solutionLines: function propOr<T, K extends keyof T>(obj: T, k: K, d: T[K]): T[K] {
return k in obj ? obj[k] : d;
exercises.hint: return k in obj ? obj[k] : d;
exercises.lore: A missing channel falls back to the safe default — a live one is read as-is.

exercises.title: VALUE DUMP
exercises.brief: Spill every stored value into an array.
promptLines: Define **valuesOf<T extends object>(obj: T): Array<T[keyof T]>** returning an array of `obj`'s own values.
`T[keyof T]` is the union of every field's type, so the array carries exactly the values `obj` stores.
starterLines: function valuesOf<T extends object>(obj: T): Array<T[keyof T]> {
// TODO: dump the values of obj
solutionLines: function valuesOf<T extends object>(obj: T): Array<T[keyof T]> {

tests.name: mixed value types in order
tests.code: assertEqual(valuesOf({ id: 1, on: true, tag: 'x' }), [1, true, 'x']);

exercises.lore: Open every register and read the payloads in order.
